milestones.title: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
M4 — QA, proof and release candidate

tasks.title: [EPIC] M0 Governance and baseline
tasks.objective: Establish an auditable operating model, access controls, project views, source baseline, risk controls, time tracking and commercial assumptions.
acceptance_criteria: All M0 child issues are completed or formally deferred with accepted risk.
Course-Development-Team access is verified for both repository and project.
Required project views, labels, milestones and issue controls are evidenced.
M0 exit decision is recorded in meeting minutes.
tasks.evidence: Links to completed M0 issues, access screenshot/API output, project URL and governance meeting record

tasks.title: [EPIC] M1 Course architecture and content plan
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Approve a market-valid, measurable and production-feasible course architecture before asset creation begins.
acceptance_criteria: All M1 child issues are complete.
The curriculum supports 240 minutes maximum and at least five lectures.
Learning outcomes, activities and assessments are aligned.
Rights, policy and production standards are approved.
tasks.evidence: Approved course blueprint, alignment matrix, rights register and architecture gate record

tasks.title: [EPIC] M2 Scripts slides and learner assets
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce complete, reviewed and recording-ready instructional assets for all eight modules.
acceptance_criteria: Every module pack meets the recording-ready gate.
Slide deck, workbook and assessments are versioned.
No placeholder, unsupported or unlicensed material remains.
Independent review evidence is linked.
tasks.evidence: Module pack folders, master deck, workbook, assessment bank and recording-readiness approval

tasks.title: [EPIC] M3 Recording and post-production
tasks.objective: Record, edit, caption and export all course media to the approved technical standard.
acceptance_criteria: Test video feedback is resolved.
All planned lectures are recorded and edited.
Captions are corrected and media inventory reconciled.
Source and master files are backed up.
tasks.evidence: Recording logs, approved exports, caption files, media inventory and backup evidence

tasks.title: [EPIC] M4 QA proof and release candidate
tasks.milestone: M4 — QA, proof and release candidate
tasks.objective: Validate instructional, factual, language, media, accessibility and platform readiness before submission.
acceptance_criteria: All P0 and P1 defects are closed.
Pilot learner findings are resolved or accepted.
Release candidate is immutable and version tagged.
Final risk acceptance is documented.
tasks.evidence: QA reports, defect register, pilot feedback and release-candidate approval

tasks.title: [EPIC] M5 Udemy publication
tasks.objective: Configure, submit and publish the course on Udemy with complete evidence and commercial controls.
acceptance_criteria: Udemy minimum requirements and Trust & Safety controls are met.
Course is submitted by 2 September 2026 to allow the stated two-business-day review window.
Required feedback is resolved and the public URL is captured.
Actual publication investment is reconciled.
tasks.evidence: Udemy submission record, review feedback, public URL and actual-cost snapshot

tasks.title: [EPIC] M6 Launch marketing
tasks.objective: Execute a measurable, policy-compliant launch campaign and establish channel attribution.
acceptance_criteria: Launch assets and tracking links are approved.
Social, email and partner campaigns are deployed.
Coupon, review and promotional practices comply with Udemy policy.
Launch baseline metrics are recorded.
tasks.evidence: Campaign calendar, published assets, tracking dashboard and launch report

tasks.title: [EPIC] M7 ROI validation and lifecycle
tasks.objective: Measure 30-, 60- and 90-day learning and commercial performance and approve the next investment decision.
acceptance_criteria: 30-, 60- and 90-day reviews are complete on their actual dates.
Time, cash cost, payout, refunds and support cost are reconciled.
Break-even and ROI use realised net contribution.
Lifecycle decision is approved.
tasks.evidence: Performance reviews, financial model and signed lifecycle decision

tasks.title: [EPIC] M8 180-day lifecycle review
tasks.objective: Perform the first full content-currency, market, policy and maintenance review six months after publication.
acceptance_criteria: Course content, links, examples and platform guidance are checked for currency.
Learner feedback themes and support demand are analysed.
Update backlog and next review date are approved.
Retire or refresh decisions include ROI implications.
tasks.evidence: 180-day review report, updated backlog and lifecycle decision

tasks.title: Approve project charter and role ownership
tasks.objective: Approve the charter, role accountabilities, decision rights and independent QA requirement.
acceptance_criteria: Named accountable person is recorded for each role.
Scope, exclusions, dates and commercial assumptions are accepted.
Independent QA owner is not the original author where practical.
Approval record links to the charter version reviewed.
tasks.evidence: Approved PROJECT.md commit and meeting decision

tasks.title: Inventory and version the source outline manuscript and presentation
tasks.objective: Create a controlled inventory of all supplied source files, versions, owners, rights status and intended use.
acceptance_criteria: Every source asset has a canonical filename and version.
Source owner, format, location and rights status are recorded.
Duplicates and obsolete versions are identified.
No confidential or personal data is stored without approval.
tasks.evidence: Source inventory file and repository paths

tasks.title: Approve time budget cost assumptions and ROI targets
tasks.objective: Approve a defensible time and cost baseline using opportunity cost, direct cash costs and realised platform contribution.
acceptance_criteria: Initial production-hours baseline equals the sum of vetted pre-publication tasks.
Hourly rate and direct-cost assumptions have owners and dates.
Conservative, base and upside contribution scenarios are documented.
Break-even formulas use realised payout less variable cost, not list price.
tasks.evidence: Approved ROI assumptions CSV and meeting decision

tasks.title: Create GitHub Project views fields and automation
tasks.objective: Create and verify the organization Project, required custom fields, issue intake automation and management views.
acceptance_criteria: Project URL is recorded.
Required fields exist and contain the defined options.
All repository issues and PRs are added automatically.
Eight required views exist with the documented filters and layouts.
A screenshot or API export proves each view.
tasks.evidence: Project URL, field export and view evidence

tasks.title: Record weekly production review cadence and first meeting minutes
tasks.objective: Establish the governance cadence and record the first production review using the meeting-minutes issue form.
acceptance_criteria: Recurring review cadence, chair and attendees are confirmed.
First meeting minutes include decisions, actions, blockers and milestone health.
Actions reference issue numbers and due dates.
Meeting time is added to the time log.
tasks.evidence: Meeting-minutes issue and calendar/cadence evidence

tasks.title: Verify Course-Development-Team repository and project access
tasks.objective: Verify every member of Course-Development-Team can access the repository and organization Project at the approved role.
acceptance_criteria: Team slug and current member list are exported.
Repository permission is Admin for the team.
Project permission is Admin for the team.
A non-owner team member validates repository, issue, PR and project access.
Evidence contains no access tokens or secrets.
tasks.evidence: API output or screenshots showing team membership and Admin roles

tasks.title: Configure branch protection and Course-Development-Team review rules
tasks.objective: Protect main so substantive changes require a pull request, passing checks and Course-Development-Team review.
acceptance_criteria: Direct pushes to main are restricted except approved emergency roles.
Project quality audit is required before merge.
At least one approval is required.
Course-Development-Team is configured through CODEOWNERS or rulesets.
Dismiss stale approvals after material changes.
tasks.evidence: Ruleset export or screenshots and test PR evidence

tasks.title: Establish project risk change and decision registers
tasks.objective: Create controlled registers for risks, scope changes, assumptions and decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Risk entries include probability, impact, owner, mitigation and review date.
Changes include schedule, effort and ROI impact.
Decision records identify approver and effective date.
P0/P1 items are linked to blocker issues.
tasks.evidence: Versioned risk/change/decision register

tasks.title: Validate learner personas course promise and positioning
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Validate the primary learner segments, job-to-be-done, entry knowledge, constraints and credible course promise.
acceptance_criteria: At least two primary personas are documented.
Pain points and desired performance outcomes are evidence-based.
Course promise avoids guaranteed personal or financial outcomes.
Exclusions and prerequisites are explicit.
tasks.evidence: Persona and positioning brief

tasks.title: Validate market demand and competitor positioning
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Use current marketplace evidence to validate demand, keywords, competitive gaps and pricing position.
acceptance_criteria: Udemy Marketplace Insights or equivalent evidence is captured with date.
Top competing courses are compared on promise, runtime, rating, reviews, curriculum and price positioning.
Differentiators are specific and supportable.
Keyword shortlist is approved for title, subtitle and description.
tasks.evidence: Market-validation report and dated evidence

tasks.title: Rewrite measurable course and module learning outcomes
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Replace broad statements with observable, assessable course and module outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: Outcomes use measurable verbs and specify conditions or standards where relevant.
Each module has no more than a manageable set of outcomes.
Outcomes match the target audience and course duration.
No outcome claims accreditation, certification or guaranteed results.
tasks.evidence: Approved learning-outcomes register

tasks.title: Create objective content activity and assessment alignment matrix
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Map every outcome to instruction, practice, assessment and evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Every outcome has at least one learning activity and assessment method.
Assessment difficulty matches the cognitive level.
Coverage gaps and unnecessary content are removed.
Matrix identifies module, lecture and learner resource.
tasks.evidence: Completed alignment matrix

tasks.title: Approve lecture map sequencing and runtime budget
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Approve the lesson sequence, lecture count, pacing and 240-minute maximum production runtime.
acceptance_criteria: Course contains at least five lectures and at least 30 minutes of video.
Planned total video runtime is no more than 240 minutes.
Each lecture has a purpose, outcome and estimated duration.
Sequence moves from foundation to application and avoids duplication.
tasks.evidence: Approved lesson map and runtime budget

tasks.title: Audit source content for duplication placeholders and unsupported claims
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Identify and resolve duplicate, placeholder, inaccurate, unsupported or stale content in the supplied sources.
acceptance_criteria: All placeholders and temporary links are logged.
Unsupported claims are removed or sourced.
Duplicate sections are consolidated.
Findings include severity, owner and remediation disposition.
tasks.evidence: Source-content audit report and remediation issue links

tasks.title: Approve reference copyright and source citation policy
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Approve how external sources, trademarks, images, music, templates, AI-assisted content and quotations may be used.
acceptance_criteria: Rights register distinguishes owned, licensed, public-domain and excluded assets.
Citation format and source-quality standard are documented.
Trademark and third-party brand usage is reviewed.
AI-assisted content is human-reviewed and disclosed where required.
No asset is used without defensible permission.
tasks.evidence: Approved rights register and citation policy

tasks.title: Approve recording visual audio and file standards
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Approve media specifications, visual system, file naming, source retention and backup standards.
acceptance_criteria: Video is 720p or 1080p, 16:9, and tested on desktop/mobile.
Audio is synchronized, dual-channel and non-distracting.
Naming and folder conventions support version traceability.
Source, master and delivery files have backup and retention rules.
Caption and transcript formats are defined.
tasks.evidence: Approved production standards document

tasks.title: Confirm Udemy instructor commercial and compliance readiness
tasks.milestone: M1 — Course architecture and content plan
tasks.objective: Confirm the instructor account, identity, premium status, payment, tax, pricing and policy prerequisites for a paid publication.
acceptance_criteria: Instructor identity-verification status is recorded.
Premium Instructor, payout and tax settings are complete or have blockers.
Paid/free decision is approved; if free, runtime restriction is checked.
Revenue-share assumptions are dated and linked to current official guidance.
Trust & Safety, review, coupon and promotional rules are acknowledged.
tasks.evidence: Commercial-readiness checklist and account screenshots with sensitive data redacted

tasks.title: Build M01 recording-ready content pack
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce the complete recording-ready script, slides, activity, assessment and references for M01 — Introduction to Productivity.
acceptance_criteria: Script states learner outcome and practical relevance.
Slides support narration without excessive on-screen text.
At least one application activity or reflection is included.
Knowledge check or assessment maps to the approved outcome.
All facts, examples and third-party assets are reviewed.
Runtime remains within the approved module budget.
tasks.evidence: Versioned M01 script, slide section, activity, assessment and review record

tasks.title: Build M02 recording-ready content pack
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce the complete recording-ready script, slides, activity, assessment and references for M02 — Goal Setting.
acceptance_criteria: Script states learner outcome and practical relevance.
Slides support narration without excessive on-screen text.
At least one application activity or reflection is included.
Knowledge check or assessment maps to the approved outcome.
All facts, examples and third-party assets are reviewed.
Runtime remains within the approved module budget.
tasks.evidence: Versioned M02 script, slide section, activity, assessment and review record

tasks.title: Build M03 recording-ready content pack
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce the complete recording-ready script, slides, activity, assessment and references for M03 — Time Management Techniques.
acceptance_criteria: Script states learner outcome and practical relevance.
Slides support narration without excessive on-screen text.
At least one application activity or reflection is included.
Knowledge check or assessment maps to the approved outcome.
All facts, examples and third-party assets are reviewed.
Runtime remains within the approved module budget.
tasks.evidence: Versioned M03 script, slide section, activity, assessment and review record

tasks.title: Build M04 recording-ready content pack
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce the complete recording-ready script, slides, activity, assessment and references for M04 — Eliminating Distractions.
acceptance_criteria: Script states learner outcome and practical relevance.
Slides support narration without excessive on-screen text.
At least one application activity or reflection is included.
Knowledge check or assessment maps to the approved outcome.
All facts, examples and third-party assets are reviewed.
Runtime remains within the approved module budget.
tasks.evidence: Versioned M04 script, slide section, activity, assessment and review record

tasks.title: Build M05 recording-ready content pack
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce the complete recording-ready script, slides, activity, assessment and references for M05 — Efficient Task Management.
acceptance_criteria: Script states learner outcome and practical relevance.
Slides support narration without excessive on-screen text.
At least one application activity or reflection is included.
Knowledge check or assessment maps to the approved outcome.
All facts, examples and third-party assets are reviewed.
Runtime remains within the approved module budget.
tasks.evidence: Versioned M05 script, slide section, activity, assessment and review record

tasks.title: Build M06 recording-ready content pack
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce the complete recording-ready script, slides, activity, assessment and references for M06 — Effective Communication.
acceptance_criteria: Script states learner outcome and practical relevance.
Slides support narration without excessive on-screen text.
At least one application activity or reflection is included.
Knowledge check or assessment maps to the approved outcome.
All facts, examples and third-party assets are reviewed.
Runtime remains within the approved module budget.
tasks.evidence: Versioned M06 script, slide section, activity, assessment and review record

tasks.title: Build M07 recording-ready content pack
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce the complete recording-ready script, slides, activity, assessment and references for M07 — Mindset and Motivation.
acceptance_criteria: Script states learner outcome and practical relevance.
Slides support narration without excessive on-screen text.
At least one application activity or reflection is included.
Knowledge check or assessment maps to the approved outcome.
All facts, examples and third-party assets are reviewed.
Runtime remains within the approved module budget.
tasks.evidence: Versioned M07 script, slide section, activity, assessment and review record

tasks.title: Build M08 recording-ready content pack
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Produce the complete recording-ready script, slides, activity, assessment and references for M08 — Habit Formation.
acceptance_criteria: Script states learner outcome and practical relevance.
Slides support narration without excessive on-screen text.
At least one application activity or reflection is included.
Knowledge check or assessment maps to the approved outcome.
All facts, examples and third-party assets are reviewed.
Runtime remains within the approved module budget.
tasks.evidence: Versioned M08 script, slide section, activity, assessment and review record

tasks.title: Create full-course slide design system and master deck
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Create a consistent, accessible slide system and combine all module visuals into the master deck.
acceptance_criteria: Master layouts cover title, objectives, concept, process, example, activity, recap and references.
Typography and contrast are readable in recorded video.
Brand usage is consistent and rights-cleared.
All modules use the same navigation and visual conventions.
Deck has no placeholders or unresolved comments.
tasks.evidence: Master deck and slide-system guide

tasks.title: Create learner workbook templates and action tools
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Create accessible, practical learner resources that support application beyond video consumption.
acceptance_criteria: Workbook maps activities to modules and outcomes.
Templates are editable and include instructions and examples.
Resources do not require paid third-party tools unless disclosed.
Headings, tables and links are accessible.
Version and copyright notice are included.
tasks.evidence: Workbook and reusable templates

tasks.title: Create quizzes practical assignments and answer guidance
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Create valid knowledge checks and practical assignments with answer guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Questions assess approved outcomes rather than trivia.
Distractors are plausible and unambiguous.
Answer explanations teach why an option is correct or incorrect.
Practical assignments include criteria or exemplars.
No assessment exposes personal or confidential learner data.
tasks.evidence: Assessment bank, assignment briefs and answer guidance

tasks.title: Complete recording-readiness proof and approval
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Perform the recording-ready gate across every planned lecture and learner asset.
acceptance_criteria: All eight module packs pass the recording-ready checklist.
Runtime sum matches the approved 240-minute maximum.
Rights, references, spelling and on-screen instructions are checked.
P0/P1 defects are closed.
Approved versions are tagged or otherwise frozen for recording.
tasks.evidence: Recording-readiness QA report and approval

tasks.title: Create learner support FAQ and resource-link register
tasks.milestone: M2 — Scripts, slides and learner assets
tasks.objective: Prepare support guidance, FAQs and a maintainable register of every external resource link used in the course.
acceptance_criteria: FAQ covers prerequisites, downloads, activities, support boundaries and common technical issues.
Every external link has owner, purpose, review date and fallback.
No prohibited marketing or off-platform solicitation is embedded.
Support response expectations are defined.
tasks.evidence: FAQ document and link register

tasks.title: Complete studio and recording workflow test
tasks.objective: Validate the complete capture, audio, lighting, screen-recording, teleprompter, export and backup workflow before full recording.
acceptance_criteria: A 1–3 minute Udemy test video is submitted or equivalent technical review is completed.
Feedback on audio, video and delivery is recorded and resolved.
1080p/720p 16:9 output and dual-channel audio are verified.
File naming, storage and backup workflow are tested.
tasks.evidence: Test video, feedback, remediation notes and approved sample export

tasks.title: Record and edit course promo video
tasks.objective: Produce a concise promo video that accurately represents the course, audience, outcomes and instructor credibility.
acceptance_criteria: Claims match delivered content and avoid guarantees.
Audio/video meet the approved standard.
Promo introduces audience, problem, outcomes and course experience.
No unlicensed media or prohibited promotional claims are present.
Final export is reviewed by marketing and QA.
tasks.evidence: Promo script, source, final export and approval

tasks.title: Record modules M01 to M04
tasks.objective: Record all approved lectures for modules M01–M04 without changing instructional scope outside change control.
acceptance_criteria: Every planned lecture is recorded against the approved script version.
Retakes and deviations are logged.
Audio and video are spot-checked after each session.
Source files are named and backed up.
Actual recording time is logged.
tasks.evidence: Recording log and source files for M01–M04

tasks.title: Record modules M05 to M08
tasks.objective: Record all approved lectures for modules M05–M08 without changing instructional scope outside change control.
acceptance_criteria: Every planned lecture is recorded against the approved script version.
Retakes and deviations are logged.
Audio and video are spot-checked after each session.
Source files are named and backed up.
Actual recording time is logged.
tasks.evidence: Recording log and source files for M05–M08

tasks.title: Edit caption and export modules M01 to M04
tasks.objective: Edit, caption, quality-check and export all M01–M04 lectures.
acceptance_criteria: Errors, dead air and distracting noise are removed without distorting meaning.
Audio is synchronized and present in both channels.
Captions are manually corrected for terminology and timing.
Exports meet resolution, aspect-ratio and playback standards.
Source project and masters are retained.
tasks.evidence: Final exports, caption files and edit logs for M01–M04

tasks.title: Edit caption and export modules M05 to M08
tasks.objective: Edit, caption, quality-check and export all M05–M08 lectures.
acceptance_criteria: Errors, dead air and distracting noise are removed without distorting meaning.
Audio is synchronized and present in both channels.
Captions are manually corrected for terminology and timing.
Exports meet resolution, aspect-ratio and playback standards.
Source project and masters are retained.
tasks.evidence: Final exports, caption files and edit logs for M05–M08

tasks.title: Reconcile final lecture count runtime and media inventory
tasks.objective: Reconcile every source, master, caption, thumbnail, promo and delivery asset against the approved curriculum.
acceptance_criteria: At least five separate lectures exist.
Total video runtime is at least 30 minutes and no more than the approved 240 minutes.
No lecture or caption file is missing or duplicated.
Checksums or equivalent version identifiers are recorded.
Backup location and restore test are confirmed.
tasks.evidence: Final media inventory and runtime report

tasks.title: Verify production backup restore and retention
tasks.objective: Prove that source, project, master and delivery media can be restored from the approved backup location.
acceptance_criteria: Backup includes source video, audio, edit projects, captions, graphics and final exports.
A sample restore is completed and compared to source.
Retention owner and period are documented.
Access is restricted to approved contributors.
tasks.evidence: Backup inventory and restore-test record

tasks.title: Perform instructional design and factual QA
tasks.milestone: M4 — QA, proof and release candidate
tasks.objective: Review the complete course for outcome alignment, accuracy, coherence, practical value and cognitive load.
acceptance_criteria: Every outcome is taught and assessed.
Facts and references are verified against authoritative sources.
Examples are realistic and inclusive.
No duplicate, contradictory or unsupported guidance remains.
Defects are logged with severity and owner.
tasks.evidence: Instructional/factual QA report and closed defect links

tasks.title: Perform language proof and consistency review
tasks.milestone: M4 — QA, proof and release candidate
tasks.objective: Proof all learner-facing text, narration transcripts, captions, slides, workbook and landing-page copy.
acceptance_criteria: Spelling, grammar, punctuation and terminology are consistent.
Module, lecture and resource names match across all assets.
Captions reflect spoken meaning and proper nouns.
No placeholder or internal production notes remain.
Corrections are applied to source and final assets.
tasks.evidence: Proofing report and corrected asset versions

tasks.title: Perform video audio caption and accessibility QA
tasks.milestone: M4 — QA, proof and release candidate
tasks.objective: Validate playback, audio, captions, visual legibility and accessibility across representative devices.
acceptance_criteria: Every video plays from start to finish without corruption.
Audio is synchronized, dual-channel and non-distracting.
Captions are accurate, timed and complete.
Visual text is legible and meaningful visuals are explained.
Desktop and mobile spot checks pass.
tasks.evidence: Media/accessibility QA report and device test evidence

tasks.title: Conduct pilot learner review and remediate findings
tasks.milestone: M4 — QA, proof and release candidate
tasks.objective: Run a structured pilot with representative learners and remediate material learning-experience defects.
acceptance_criteria: Pilot includes at least three representative reviewers where feasible.
Feedback covers clarity, pacing, usefulness, difficulty and technical experience.
Findings are triaged by severity.
P0/P1 findings are resolved or explicitly accepted.
Consent and privacy are respected.
tasks.evidence: Pilot protocol, anonymized feedback and remediation record

tasks.title: Approve final release candidate and accepted risks
tasks.milestone: M4 — QA, proof and release candidate
tasks.objective: Approve the immutable release candidate after review of defects, risks, evidence and platform readiness.
acceptance_criteria: All required QA reports are complete.
No open P0/P1 defects remain.
Accepted P2/P3 risks have owners and review dates.
Release candidate version/tag and checksums are recorded.
Course owner and QA lead approve.
tasks.evidence: Signed release-candidate decision and version identifier

tasks.title: Complete Udemy Trust Safety copyright and policy compliance review
tasks.milestone: M4 — QA, proof and release candidate
tasks.objective: Validate the release candidate against current Udemy Trust & Safety, content, review, marketing, copyright and AI-use rules.
acceptance_criteria: Instructor Content and Behavior Rules are reviewed.
Copyright, trademark and restricted-topic checks pass.
Review manipulation and prohibited marketing practices are excluded.
External links and bonus content comply with current rules.
Any AI-assisted content meets current quality and disclosure requirements.
tasks.evidence: Completed policy checklist with dated official-source links

tasks.title: Finalise Udemy landing page instructor profile and creative
tasks.objective: Create the complete course landing page and instructor presentation using validated positioning and current Udemy standards.
acceptance_criteria: Unique course image meets current image standards.
Title and subtitle include relevant, natural keywords.
Description exceeds 200 words and accurately reflects the course.
Intended learners section is complete.
Instructor bio and profile picture are complete.
Claims and creative are rights-cleared.
tasks.evidence: Landing-page copy, image source, instructor profile and review evidence

tasks.title: Upload and configure curriculum resources captions and messages
tasks.objective: Upload and correctly configure the approved curriculum, downloadable resources, captions and learner communications.
acceptance_criteria: All lectures are ordered correctly and titles match the approved map.
Resources and captions are attached to the correct lectures.
Preview settings, welcome and completion messages are approved.
No internal source files or confidential data are uploaded.
Full course is previewed as a learner.
tasks.evidence: Udemy curriculum screenshots and upload checklist

tasks.title: Complete Udemy release checklist and submit for review
tasks.objective: Perform the final platform checklist and submit the complete course early enough to support the publication target.
acceptance_criteria: Course has at least 30 minutes of video and at least five lectures.
720p/1080p video, synchronized dual-channel audio and landing-page requirements pass.
Trust & Safety and commercial readiness checks are complete.
Course is submitted no later than 2 September 2026.
Submission timestamp and status are recorded.
tasks.evidence: Completed release checklist and submission evidence

tasks.title: Resolve Udemy review feedback and publish
tasks.objective: Resolve all required Udemy Quality Review findings and obtain published status.
acceptance_criteria: Every required fix is tracked to completion.
Material content changes repeat relevant internal QA.
Course is resubmitted promptly after fixes.
Live status and public URL are verified.
Potential search-discovery delay is recorded separately from publication.
tasks.evidence: Review feedback log, resubmission evidence and live status

tasks.title: Record public course URL publication evidence and actual investment
tasks.objective: Capture publication evidence and freeze the actual initial investment baseline for ROI measurement.
acceptance_criteria: Public URL, publication timestamp and final course metadata are recorded.
All time logs through publication are reconciled.
Direct costs and approved opportunity cost are totalled.
Baseline excludes post-publication lifecycle effort unless explicitly included.
Financial record links to source evidence.
tasks.evidence: Publication evidence and actual-investment snapshot

tasks.title: Produce launch creative clips lead magnet and tracking links
tasks.objective: Produce policy-compliant launch assets and an attribution-ready campaign package.
acceptance_criteria: Creative reflects the actual course and approved brand.
At least three reusable clips/posts and one lead asset are complete.
Every channel link uses a documented attribution convention.
Coupon terms and expiry are approved.
No review manipulation or guaranteed-outcome claims are used.
tasks.evidence: Creative pack, source files, UTM/link register and approval

tasks.title: Execute social and email launch campaign
tasks.objective: Deploy the approved launch sequence across owned social and email channels and record performance.
acceptance_criteria: Campaign calendar is executed or deviations are documented.
Each message has audience, channel, owner and tracking link.
Consent and unsubscribe controls are respected.
Reach, clicks, enrolments and realised payout are captured where available.
Support questions are routed.
tasks.evidence: Published campaign links, email report and launch metrics

tasks.title: Execute partner affiliate and influencer outreach
tasks.objective: Activate a controlled partner and affiliate outreach process with clear claims, links and commercial terms.
acceptance_criteria: Target list and outreach status are documented.
Partners receive approved copy and tracking links.
Affiliate or referral terms are recorded.
No incentivized or manipulated reviews are requested.
Leads and enrolments are attributed.
tasks.evidence: Outreach register, approved pack and channel results

tasks.title: Establish launch analytics learner-support and incident dashboard
tasks.objective: Create the operational dashboard used for performance, support, refunds, reviews and content incidents.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard captures enrolments, payout, refunds, rating, reviews, completion proxies and support demand.
Metrics have definitions, source, owner and update cadence.
Learner issues can create defects or lifecycle tasks.
Sensitive learner information is minimized and protected.
tasks.evidence: Analytics dashboard and metric dictionary

tasks.title: Complete 30-day commercial and learner experience review
tasks.objective: Review the first 30 days of commercial performance, learner experience, support demand and urgent optimisation needs.
acceptance_criteria: Actual 30-day cutoff is used.
Enrolments, payout, refunds, rating, reviews and engagement indicators are reconciled.
Top learner questions and drop-off signals are analysed.
Urgent defects and quick wins become owned issues.
ROI forecast is refreshed.
tasks.evidence: 30-day review report and linked improvement issues

tasks.title: Complete 60-day performance and optimisation review
tasks.objective: Review 60-day channel efficiency, learner outcomes, content issues and progress to break-even.
acceptance_criteria: Actual 60-day cutoff is used.
Channel-level payout and conversion are compared.
Rating, review, refund and support trends are assessed.
Content or landing-page experiments have hypotheses and owners.
Break-even forecast is updated.
tasks.evidence: 60-day review report and optimisation backlog

tasks.title: Complete 90-day actual ROI and break-even analysis
tasks.objective: Calculate actual 90-day ROI, contribution margin and progress to break-even using reconciled time, costs and realised revenue.
acceptance_criteria: Actual hours and direct costs are complete.
Platform payout, refunds, taxes/fees and variable support/marketing costs are reconciled.
ROI and break-even formulas are shown and independently checked.
Scenario variance versus baseline is explained.
Data cutoff and limitations are stated.
tasks.evidence: 90-day financial model and independent review

tasks.title: Approve continue optimise re-record reprice bundle or retire decision
tasks.objective: Approve the next lifecycle investment decision using learning, market and financial evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Decision explicitly selects continue, optimise, re-record, reprice, bundle or retire.
Rationale references learner and financial evidence.
Approved budget, owner and deadline are recorded.
Risks and expected ROI impact are stated.
Next review date is confirmed.
tasks.evidence: Signed lifecycle decision and funded action backlog

tasks.title: Schedule and complete 180-day content currency review
tasks.objective: Perform the six-month content, link, market, policy and learner-feedback review.
acceptance_criteria: Actual 180-day cutoff is used.
All links, examples, downloads and platform instructions are checked.
Learner feedback and competitor changes are analysed.
Stale or weak content becomes prioritized update issues.
Next review is scheduled.
tasks.evidence: 180-day review report and update backlog

tasks.title: Review Udemy policy pricing and revenue-share changes at 180 days
tasks.objective: Revalidate platform, promotional, pricing, payout and Trust & Safety assumptions before the next lifecycle investment.
acceptance_criteria: Current official policies are compared with the publication baseline.
Commercial-model changes are reflected in ROI forecasts.
Required course or marketing changes become issues.
Evidence is dated and linked.
tasks.evidence: Policy-change assessment and updated assumptions
